creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 209080
alfio - correct email

Sorry, I have inserted the wrong e-mail address in the Makefile: at the moment I have a FreeBSD e-mail alias, but it is not a full FreeBSD account yet. Thus I cannot use it for port maintainership and I must use another e-mail address.

This patch changes my e-mail address for maintainership of alfio.
